case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK VS. KEVIN SESSUMS

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS BANK, FSB A FEDERAL SAVINGS BANK AS TO DEFENDANT SESSUMS, KEVIN JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
